P0335

Difficulty

Medium

Est. Time

Cost

🔍 The Problem

CKP Sensor Circuit.

⚠️ Common Symptoms:

  • CKP sensor

🔧 How to Fix Jeep P0335 - Step by Step

1

Step 1: Replace CKP

Replace CKP. For Jeep Car, this is a common troubleshooting step. Follow manufacturer guidelines and ensure proper safety precautions.

!

Safety First

Always disconnect power before working on any appliance. If you're unsure, consult a professional technician.
